executives.name: Philip Williams
executives.background: Mr. Williams has over 20 years of experience in the mining and finance industry. He was previously the CEO of Consolidated Uranium Inc. and has held senior roles in investment banking and equity research.

executives.name: Graham du Preez
executives.background: Mr. du Preez is a Chartered Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as CFO of Uranium Royalty Corp. and has held senior financial roles at several mining companies.

executives.name: Darryl Clark
executives.background: Dr. Clark is a geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held executive and board positions with several exploration and mining companies globally.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Exploration and Development

executives.name: Peter Netupsky
executives.background: Mr. Netupsky has over 20 years of experience in corporate finance and investment banking. He was previously the EVP, Corporate Development at Consolidated Uranium Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Development, Director, Executive Vice President

executives.name: Marty Tunney
executives.background: Mr. Tunney is a professional engineer with over 18 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as President and COO of Consolidated Uranium Inc.

executives.name: Christopher McFadden
executives.background: Mr. McFadden is a lawyer with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, currently serving as Chairman of NexGen Energy.

executives.name: Leigh Curyer
executives.background: Mr. Curyer is the founder, President, and CEO of NexGen Energy Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in the resources sector.

executives.name: Richard Pattee
executives.background: Mr. Pattee has over 30 years of experience in the mining and finance industry. He has held senior roles in investment banking and corporate development.

executives.name: Trevor Thiele
executives.background: Mr. Thiele has over 30 years of experience in senior financial roles. He was the CFO of several major Australian resource companies.

board_of_directors.name: Leigh Curyer
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Curyer is the founder and CEO of NexGen Energy Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in the resources sector, including corporate finance and executive management.
